event: multiple hospital and Intensive Care Unit (ICU) admissions for worsening parkinsonism
treated with intravenous clindamycin 600 mg thrice daily
treated with intravenous benzylpenicillin 2 million units 4 times daily
escalated to intravenous linezolid 600 mg twice daily
escalated to intravenous piperacillin with tazobactam 4.5 gm thrice daily
switched to insulin on ICU admission
improving white blood cell counts from 14,200 cells/mm3 to 11,000 cells/mm3
stable and remained asymptomatic for serotonin syndrome
linezolid is an oxazolidinone class of antibiotic and a weak, reversible MAO inhibitor
records from postmarketing voluntary adverse event reporting system database identified 29 cases of serotonin syndrome associated with linezolid
combination of serotonergic drugs; linezolid and rasagiline were most likely to be responsible for serotonin syndrome
diagnosis of serotonin syndrome is purely on the basis of patient presentation
requires a strong clinical suspicion, proper medication history of serotonergic drugs and identification of specific signs and symptoms
clinical examination, laboratory investigations, imaging, and cultures ruled out the other possibilities
excluded substance abuse or withdrawal, metabolic, and psychiatric etiologies
onset of serotonin syndrome ranges from few hours to 3 weeks
time to resolution of serotonin syndrome after discontinuation of the culprit drugs ranges from <6 hours to 5 days
Cyproheptadine, a serotonin antagonist, can be given in severe serotonin syndrome
Micromedex suggests concomitant use of linezolid and serotonergic agents are contraindicated
if linezolid is to be administered, it is recommended that the serotonergic drug must be discontinued
patients with unresolving fever, prescribers should think of the drugs and drug interactions causing the serotonergic syndrome
prescribers should know the medication history of the patient and washout period of serotonergic drugs
serotonin syndrome is self-limiting if identified early, culprit drugs are discontinued, and supportive care is initiated
